task_completion.description: Access the flight plan creation interface in Avare
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare application is open and the 'Plan' or 'Route' screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Set the departure airport to KLAX
task_completion.visual_evidence: The identifier 'KLAX' is entered as the first waypoint or origin in the flight plan list.

task_completion.description: Set the destination airport to KJFK
task_completion.visual_evidence: The identifier 'KJFK' is entered as the final waypoint or destination in the flight plan list.

task_completion.description: Add at least 4 intermediate waypoints to the flight plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flight plan list contains at least 4 additional aviation identifiers (navaids, fixes, or airports) between KLAX and KJFK, making the total number of waypoints at least 6.

task_completion.description: Display the IFR Low-Altitude Enroute chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is set to 'IFR Low' (visible in a map layer/chart selection menu or indicated by the visual style of the map showing Victor airways, MEAs, and VOR compass roses).
A 'Save' button is clicked, a saved route name is visible in a list of saved plans, or a confirmation dialog indicating the plan was saved is shown.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Avare graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare app UI being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands or text editors being used to create a flight plan file.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the Avare aviation GPS app, not a web browser searching for flight plans or a different flight simulator.

integrity.description: The intermediate waypoints are genuine aviation identifiers
integrity.visual_evidence: The intermediate waypoints entered are standard 3-to-5 letter aviation identifiers (e.g., VORs, intersections) rather than random text or the literal string 'intermediate waypoint'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Departure must be KLAX (Los Angeles International). Destination must be KJFK (John F. Kennedy International). The flight plan must contain a minimum of 6 total waypoints (KLAX, KJFK, and at least 4 intermediate waypoints). The map/chart view must be set to 'IFR Low' (IFR Low-Altitude Enroute chart), which typically displays Victor airways, Minimum Enroute Altitudes (MEAs), and VOR navigation aids.
